title: Medieval MC [FORGE] - MMC4
description: Version 1.20 | Medieval Fantasy RPG Adventure & Exploration Modpack everyone wants!
body:
![In gold and grey text, "MEDIEVAL MINECRAFT" is displayed infront of a screenshot of the Minecraft Overworld. The background image has a tree with purple leaves on both sides.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bed0adec645cc7795ce93fd9e796f505e14646fb.jpeg)

![In all-caps bold text, the word "FEATURES". ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/785d3640a720d7e56cba3a6e2bbcdc37f34cf7e1.png)

⚔️ Full parity with [Curseforge Version](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/medieval-mc-mmc4)

⚔️ Completely Overhauled World Generation ([Biomes o' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty), [Geophilic](https://modrinth.com/datapack/geophilic), [Ecologics](https://modrinth.com/mod/ecologics))

⚔️ Thousands of NEW Dungeons & Structures ([Wabi-Sabi Structures](https://modrinth.com/datapack/wabi-sabi-structures), [When Dungeons Arise](https://modrinth.com/mod/when-dungeons-arise), [Towns and Towers](https://modrinth.com/mod/towns-and-towers))

⚔️ Grow Your Own Kingdom ([Minecolonies](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecolonies), [Stylecolonies](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/stylecolonies))

⚔️ Explore Magical Dimensions ([The Twilight Forest](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-twilight-forest), [The Aether](https://modrinth.com/mod/aether) & Addons, [BetterEnd](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend))

⚔️ Fully Optimized with Shader Support

⚔️ Overhauled Stronghold & Fortresses

⚔️ Powerful Bosses and Mythical Creatures ([L_Ender's Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm), [Ice and Fire: Dragons](https://modrinth.com/mod/ice-and-fire-dragons))

⚔️ In-depth Magic Mods ([Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks ](https://modrinth.com/mod/irons-spells-n-spellbooks), [Ars Nouveau](https://modrinth.com/mod/ars-nouveau/), [Eidolon: Repraised](https://modrinth.com/mod/eidolonrepraised), [Wizard's Reborn](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards-reborn))

⚔️ Stamina, Thirst and Temperature System ([Survive](https://modrinth.com/mod/survive))

⚔️ Simple Quests to Guide You

⚔️ QoL Features such as [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) and [Upgradeable Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack)

⚔️ An Immersive Medieval RPG Experience

⚔️ Built-in, [Free World Sharing](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tLTC6wYcWVM)

⚔️ [350+ Mods](https://www.modpackindex.com/modpack/64101/medieval-mc-forge-mmc4), heavily customized for integration and compatibility

[![Live count of how many members are online in the Luna Pixel Studios discord server.](https://img.shields.io/discord/790272037578473512?label=Discord&color=393939&labelColor=0843bf&style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://lunapixel.studio/discord)
